title: オーシャンSの後に・カワイイの秘策

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah. That was good. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well, Big Bro? Did my feelings reach you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well, Big Sis? Did my feelings reach you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha. I'm glad you're being honest. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now then! Next up is the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen... I'll be up against Biko.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Well, naturally...

text_block_list.name: High School Student A
text_block_list.text:
Have you heard about the Cutie ♪ Derby? You
know, the thing Curren's planning.

text_block_list.name: High School Student B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! There's no way it's not awesome—like, this
year's top trends level, I bet. I'm sooo excited.
Curren's totally got this.

text_block_list.name: High School Student A
text_block_list.text:
My dad likes that one race... the Arima Kinen, I
think? I'll tell him to watch Curren's races too. Or,
like, I'll make him!

text_block_list.name: High School Student B
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally gonna watch the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen with my mom. Curren's so awesome!

I knew it made a big splash and got people
talking the day she launched the project—it even
became a top search term. But it looks like the
hype has grown more since then.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting tons of shares and views on the
homepage. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It looks like it's gonna be even bigger than my
training series! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Our initial preparations really couldn't be going
any better. Now...
choice_data_list: All that's left is to win.
All that's left is to win.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But there's one thing on my mind...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Hi, I'm Curren Chan! ♪ Today, I'm gonna do a
cute dance just for you. ♪"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: "Hm, hm, hmmmm! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...So I started doing cute things like this on
UmaTok.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I kept working at it, and now I'm getting a
hundred times more likes than when I started.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know, but... I still can't get more likes
than Biko.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
She's been popular ever since the platform
launched, so I guess I have to do more to win.

Curren Chan remains silent. "Cuteness" is her
entire universe, the alpha and the omega. I can't
imagine she'd abandon it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Of course! Who do you think I am?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There's almost no time before the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen. Looks like I'd better get
serious. ♪

It's finally time for the big Takamatsunomiya
Kinen and the debut of the Cutie ♪ Derby.
Curren Chan's pride is on the line as the
competition begins!
